control.title: Cube controls
control.cameraTitle: Enter cube state using the camera

app.solveEmptyFail:
Solve failed: could not build a solvable pattern from this state.

This may be because CubeState → KPattern conversion is not fully implemented yet.
app.solveError:
Solving is unavailable. See the console for details.

Error: {{message}}

camera.hint: 💡 Tip: tap the center again to scan colors, or use the button below
camera.placeholder: 👆 Tap a face center to start
camera.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Check browser permissions.

instructions.center1: Tap the center: activate that face and open the preview
instructions.center2: Tap again: auto-detect colors for that face
instructions.center3: Tap another face center: switch to that face
instructions.edge1: Tap an edge cell: open the 2×3 color picker
instructions.edge2: Tap a swatch: select and close the menu
instructions.edge3: The menu highlights the solved color for the current face (e.g. white on U)
instructions.done1: When all 8 edges on a face are set, that face shows ✓
instructions.done2: When all 6 faces are done, tap “Done”
instructions.done3: Progress is shown under the net: X / 6 complete
instructions.tip1: The preview is mirrored for easier alignment
instructions.tip2: The grid helps align the physical face
instructions.tip4: The net layout shows all faces at once

colorCarousel.hint: Tap to cycle | tap a swatch to pick
